description: Beta implementation of the DiSCoVER algorithm.
author: Edwin F. Juarez;UCSD -- Mesirov Lab
plan:
## DiSCoVER GenePattern Module — Implementation Plan

### 1. Overview
DiSCoVER is a GenePattern module that Beta implementation of the DiSCoVER algorithm.

### 2. Parameters
The module exposes 3 parameters:
- Required: disease_subtype_gene_expression_sample, control_sample, output_supplementary_files
- Optional: none

### 3. Command Line
```
python /module/call_discover.py -g <disease_subtype_gene_expression_sample> -u "Custom" -c <control_sample> -s <output_supplementary_files>
```

### 4. Docker Image
Docker image: genepattern/discover\:1.3

### 5. Validation Strategy
- Validate all required parameters are provided
- Validate file formats match expected extensions
- Check parameter value ranges where applicable

### 6. Implementation Roadmap
Phase 1: Wrapper script implementation
Phase 2: Docker container setup
Phase 3: Parameter validation and error handling
Phase 4: Testing and documentation

parameters.name: disease_subtype_gene_expression_sample
parameters.description: The csv file which contains the gene expression to be used as input.

parameters.name: control_sample
parameters.description: The csv control file to use as input (to compare disease subtype samples against).

parameters.name: output_supplementary_files
parameters.description: Whether or not to output supplementary files.
